title: tiquilia canescens var. pulchella
intro: Tiquilia canescens var. pulchella, also known as the purple-flowered tiquilia or purple prairie clover, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Tiquilia canescens var. pulchella include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including skin irritations and respiratory problems.
